title: Trackpad and Keyboard Settings
drDigitalIntro: Adjust how your trackpad and keyboard work. Slow down or speed up your trackpad sensitivity. Change how fast your keyboard repeats letters when you hold down a key. Enable three-finger drag if you like. Set up keyboard shortcuts for tasks you do often. Finding the right settings makes using your Mac more comfortable and productive.
drDigitalSuccess: You can adjust hardware settings to your preference!
drDigitalHint: These settings are under Keyboard and Trackpad.
